text:
There once was a little girl named Olive who loved reading anything about pirate ghosts. One moonlit night, she heard soft whispers singing. She followed. They led her to an old oak tree.

A ghostly pirate bird perched atop.

"Where shall we swim?"

"The ocean."

"First dive."

She thought, "Aren't you thirsty?"

They drank deep.

That night, stars flew around them.

They flew.

* * *

Olive went often. Birds of every kind welcomed her.

One day, an owl.

"The stars are shy."

She laughed.

* * *

That autumn, leaves transformed.

* * *

Olive flew highest. They soared.

* * *

Just outside town.

Golden eagles.

They chased.

They fled.

Into the woods.

* * *

Golden hearts caught them.

She felt theirs.

* * *

A spring.

They nestled.

* * *

All grew together.

* * *

Olive the owl. Golden hearts everywhere.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
